title: RequestSettings
description: Request settings modify inbound requests at the edge before they are processed or forwarded to origin servers.

name.description: The name of the request settings rule.

action.description: The action to take when request settings are applied.

force_miss.description: Whether to force a cache miss for matching requests.

force_ssl.description: Whether to force SSL for matching requests.

bypass_busy_wait.description: Whether to disable collapsed forwarding for matching requests.

max_stale_age.description: The maximum stale age in seconds.

hash_keys.description: A list of items to use as the cache hash key.

xff.description: How to handle the X-Forwarded-For header.

timer_support.description: Whether to inject Fastly-specific timing headers.

geo_headers.description: Whether to add geographic headers based on client IP.

default_host.description: Sets the host header sent to the backend.

request_condition.description: The name of the condition that triggers these request settings.
